These tests cover the requirement by verifying that the AG can initiate an audio connection towards the HS and that the HS can accept the connection. Additionally, tests T-2 and T-3 verify that the AG can cause the HS to give an in-band ringing tone during connection establishment and that the HS can give an in-band ringing tone in response. Test T-4 verifies that the AG can accept a connection release initiated from the HS and that the HS can accept a connection release initiated on the AG. Test T-5 verifies that the AG can perform an audio connection transfer from AG to HS initiated by a user action on the headset and that the HS can accept the transfer. Test T-6 verifies that the AG can accept a connection release initiated from the headset and that the HS can initiate the user action to establish the connection. Test T-7 verifies that the AG can cause the HS to give an in-band ringing tone during connection establishment initiated from the AG and that the HS can give the ringing tone in response. Test T-8 verifies that the AG can accept a connection release initiated from the headset and that the HS can initiate the user action to establish the connection. Test T-9 verifies that the AG can perform an audio connection transfer from HS to AG initiated by a user action on the headset and that the HS can accept the transfer. Test T-10 verifies that the HS can establish a complete audio connection towards the AG initiated from the AG and that the AG can initiate the user action to establish the connection. Test T-11 verifies that the AG can cause the HS to give an in-band ringing tone during connection establishment initiated from the AG and that the HS can give the ringing tone in response. Test T-12 verifies that the AG can accept a connection release initiated from the headset and that the HS can initiate the user action to release the connection. Test T-13 verifies that the AG can perform an audio connection transfer from HS to AG initiated by a user action on the headset and that the HS can accept the transfer and initiate the user action to release the connection. Test T-14 verifies that the HS can store the speaker volume settings and that the correct settings are used when establishing a new connection. Test T-15 verifies that the HS can initiate the user action to set the speaker volume to the maximum level and that the AG can initiate the user action to set the speaker volume to the minimum level.
